spec_match.rationale: Uses history.pushState and DOM updates to trigger native soft-navigation heuristics, monitored by PerformanceObserver when supported.

interactive.rationale: The SPA route buttons trigger real or simulated soft-navigation log entries with a clear support status.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the observer logger concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Feature detection gates simulated logs to unsupported browsers.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Aesthetics align with the showcase design system.

summary: The open hard-rule reference issue is resolved.
